Class Order

java.lang.Object
lt.viko.eif.tsaviscevas.first.spring.model.Order
public class Order extends Object
Represents a restaurant order containing menu items. Each order has an ID and a list of ordered menu items.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Order()
    Default constructor required for JAXB.
    Order(int orderId, List<MenuItem> items)
    Creates an order with ID and menu items.

  • Constructor Details

    • Order

      public Order()
      Default constructor required for JAXB.

    • Order

      public Order(int orderId, List<MenuItem> items)
      Creates an order with ID and menu items.
      Parameters:
      orderId - unique order identifier
      items - list of ordered menu items
